Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Pete Philipson. Author.

  • Ines Sousa. Author.

  • Peter J. Diggle. Author.

  • Paula Williamson. Author.

  • Ruwanthi Kolamunnage-Dona. Author.

  • Robin Henderson. Author.

  • Graeme L. Hickey. Author, maintainer.

  • Maria Sudell. Contributor.

  • Medical Research Council. Funder.
    Grant numbers: G0400615 and MR/M013227/1

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Philipson P, Sousa I, Diggle P, Williamson P, Kolamunnage-Dona R, Henderson R, Hickey G (2018). joineR: Joint Modelling of Repeated Measurements and Time-to-Event Data. R package version 1.2.9, https://github.com/graemeleehickey/joineR/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {{joineR}: Joint Modelling of Repeated Measurements and Time-to-Event Data},
  author = {Pete Philipson and Ines Sousa and Peter J. Diggle and Paula Williamson and Ruwanthi Kolamunnage-Dona and Robin Henderson and Graeme L. Hickey},
  year = {2018},
  note = {R package version 1.2.9},
  url = {https://github.com/graemeleehickey/joineR/},
}

Williamson P, Kolamunnage-Dona R, Philipson P, Marson A (2008). “Joint modelling of longitudinal and competing risks data.” Statistics in Medicine, 27, 6426-6438. 

@Article{,
  title = {Joint modelling of longitudinal and competing risks data.},
  author = {Paula Williamson and Ruwanthi Kolamunnage-Dona and Pete Philipson and Anthony G. Marson},
  year = {2008},
  journal = {Statistics in Medicine},
  volume = {27},
  pages = {6426-6438},
}

On this page

Developed by Pete Philipson, Ines Sousa, Peter J. Diggle, Paula Williamson, Ruwanthi Kolamunnage-Dona, Robin Henderson, Graeme L. Hickey, Medical Research Council.
